title: Discord Chat Hook
description: Sends minecraft chat messages to discord using webhook
body:
Simple plugin which resends in-game chat messages to discord server using discord channel webhook. ## Installation ### in discord server 1. go to server settings 2. find ```Integrations```
![Integrations settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e59ac37ecf23a605ba68a9bf053ed691f9ad89e.png) 3. click ```webhooks```
![webhooks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cc3cacfccbd079d41ce81d4e021a7090b9c8dc3.png) 4. click on ```New Webhook``` 5. select newly created hook and set him any name and channel to post 6. finally click on ```Copy Webhook URL``` button
![webhook settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/403174d83ddc4d4ce41e30c4f3b5d8d4ffd8fa12.png) ### inside plugins folder (DiscordChatHook) 1. open ```config.yml``` 2. paste the url of your discord chat webhook after ```url:```
